overview: Sree Venkateswara College of Engineering (SVCN), Nellore, is a reputed engineering institution in the Nellore region known for strong technical infrastructure and steady placement performance in software and IT sectors.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹50,000 – ₹63,000 per year under Convenor Quota. Management quota varies by branch.

placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro, Savantis, Hexaware, Tech Mahindra

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through Andhra Pradesh counseling and management quota admissions.

campus.specialNote: Hostel & Mess combined fee ranges from ₹60,000 – ₹75,000 annually.

contact.address: Golden Nagar, North Rajupalem, NH-5 Bypass Road, SPSR Nellore District, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh 524316.

scholarships.name: JVD & Post-Metric Benefits
scholarships.description: Statutory fee waiver pathways based on Andhra Pradesh state criteria.
